summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TRACEGUARD personal safety system. All requested features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Login page, navigation sidebar, subscription plans, safe zones, and find safety features all working as expected.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' in Safe Zones dialog - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Login page loads with Google Sign-In button (Continue with Google)
Login page loads with Apple Sign-In button (Continue with Apple)
Email/password login flow works correctly (testuser@example.com)
Admin login works correctly (admin@traceguard.com)
Navigation sidebar is positioned on RIGHT side (right: 0px, fixed)
Settings link appears at bottom of navigation (below border separator)
Desktop back button appears on sub-pages (Subscription, Safe Zones, etc.)
Desktop back button hidden on Home page
Mobile back button appears on sub-pages
Mobile back button hidden on Home page
Admin Dashboard link visible for admin users
Admin Dashboard link NOT visible for regular users (role-based access working)
Subscription page shows all 4 plans: Basic (Free), Premium (₦2,500/month), Family (₦5,000/month), Corporate (₦1,500/employee/month)
Safe Zones page - Add Zone button visible and clickable
Safe Zones - Create dialog opens correctly
Safe Zones - Use Current Location button visible in dialog
Safe Zones - Zone name, type selector, radius input all present
Safe Zones - Save zone button present
Find Safety page - Send Location button visible
Find Safety page - Emergency hotlines visible (112, 199, 193, 122, 767)
Find Safety page - Category filters (All, Police, Hospitals, Barracks) all work
Mobile navigation - Menu toggle button works
Mobile navigation - Sidebar slides in from RIGHT
Mobile navigation - Bottom nav has Home, Trusted, Trip, Settings
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - add Description component or aria-describedby prop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testing completed successfully. All 12 requested features verified. Login works for both regular and admin users. Sidebar is correctly positioned on the right. Admin Dashboard link is role-based (only visible to admin). Subscription shows all 4 plans. Safe Zones dialog works with Use Current Location button. Find Safety page has all filters and emergency hotlines. Mobile responsive design working correctly.
